CONTENT.Club career: A youth product of Lille for 5 years, Kalumba moved to Angers in the summer of 2023 on a 2-year contract. He began playing with their reserves in early 2023. He made his senior and professional debut with Angers as a starter in a 1–1 Ligue 1 tie with Nice on 2 April 2023, where he played a left wing-back.
CONTENT.Playing style: Kalumba is a tricky and fast right winger, who likes to support his teammates. He is an eager assister and scorer.
CONTENT.External links: Justin Kalumba at SoccerwayJustin Kalumba at the French Football Federation (in French)Justin Kalumba – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in French
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Kalumba is of DR Congolese descent. He was called up to the France U19s in January 2021.

SUMMARY: Justin-Noël Kalumba Mwana Ngongo (born 25 December 2004) is a French professional footballer who plays as a winger for  Ligue 1 club Angers.
